author: jus4
content: Plan: Run crosslink --help and key subcommand helps to capture full output, then write a Rust test in tests/cli_integration.rs that (1) runs each subcommand with --help, (2) parses section headers (lines at column 0 ending with ':'), (3) asserts exactly one blank line before each section header except the first. Key subcommands to test: root, issue, session, kickoff, config, init, swarm. Analysis shows spacing between Commands: and Options: sections appears consistently 1 blank line across all commands examined — init/config use verbose option format but boundary spacing is the same. Will report 'cannot reproduce' if test passes.
